name: skyyrose-flagship-theme
description: SkyyRose Flagship — luxury streetwear WordPress theme. Local development, build, lint, deploy, and verification tooling for the production theme at skyyrose.co.

scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.clean: find skyyrose-flagship/assets -type f \( -name '*.min.css' -o -name '*.min.js' \) -delete && echo 'Cleaned minified assets.'
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.lint: npm run lint:php && npm run lint:css
scripts.lint:php:strict: cd skyyrose-flagship && [ -f vendor/bin/phpcs ] && vendor/bin/phpcs --standard=.phpcs.xml -s . || echo 'PHPCS not installed — run composer install in skyyrose-flagship/.'
scripts.verify: npm run lint:php 2>&1 | grep -v 'No syntax errors' | head -20; echo '--- PHP check done.'
scripts.verify:full: npm run lint && npm run build && echo '--- Verify pipeline passed.'
scripts.structure: echo 'Files:' && find skyyrose-flagship -type f -not -path '*/.*' -not -path '*/vendor/*' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' | wc -l && echo 'Dirs:' && find skyyrose-flagship -type d -not -path '*/.*' -not -path '*/vendor/*' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' | wc -l
scripts.size: echo 'CSS bundle sizes:' && find skyyrose-flagship/assets/css -name '*.min.css' -exec ls -la {} \; | awk '{ printf "%-12s %s\n", $5, $NF }' && echo '' && echo 'JS bundle sizes:' && find skyyrose-flagship/assets/js -name '*.min.js' -not -path '*/lib/*' -exec ls -la {} \; | awk '{ printf "%-12s %s\n", $5, $NF }'
